## Summary

<!-- What changed and why (short). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run check` passes (build, format, lint, test, typecheck)
- [ ] User-facing change? **Add a [Changeset](https://github.com/changesets/changesets)** (`bun run changeset`) and commit the `.changeset/*.md` file
- [ ] Public API changed? JSDoc on the new/changed export reads well in hovers and published typings (see [`docs/architecture.md`](../docs/architecture.md))
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or the public API changed — hub: [`docs/README.md`](../docs/README.md)
